options.name: -help
options.description: Prints out the command usage <transition_limit> # Transition limit value (float, required) <object_list> # List of objects: pulse generator cells, pulse generator library cells, clocks or current_design

options.name: -fall
options.description: Transition limit value is set for falling transition

options.name: -rise
options.description: Transition limit value is set for rising transition

options.name: -transitive_fanout
options.description: Transition limit value for transitive fanout
